productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Beanie Black Skull Caps
description: Created using a blend of acrylic and wool, this cap from ADIDAS is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Knitted cap made of an acrylic/wool blend, has a ribbed hem and embroidered brand name and brand label on the hem Cap care Wash inside out separately using mild detergent Do not bleach, soak or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron
